components.name: bcprov-jdk18on
components.description: The Bouncy Castle Crypto package is a Java implementation of cryptographic algorithms. This jar contains the JCA/JCE provider and low-level API for the BC Java version 1.81 for Java 8 and later.

components.name: commons-logging
components.description: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

components.name: auth
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - Auth module holds the classes that are used for authentication with services

components.name: httpcore
components.description: Apache HttpComponents Core (blocking I/O)

components.name: aws-core
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - Core runtime module holds the classes that are used by the individual service clients to interact with Amazon Web Services. Users need to depend on aws-java-sdk artifact for accessing individual client classes.

components.name: checksums-spi
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - Checksums SPI module contains checksum interfaces that are used by other modules in the library.

components.name: aws-query-protocol
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - module holds the classes for AWS Query protocol

components.name: bcpkix-jdk18on
components.description: The Bouncy Castle Java APIs for CMS, PKCS, EAC, TSP, CMP, CRMF, OCSP, and certificate generation. This jar contains APIs for JDK 1.8 and up. The APIs are designed primarily to be used in conjunction with the BC Java provider but may also be used with other providers providing cryptographic services.

components.name: metrics-spi
components.description: This is the base module for SDK metrics feature. It contains the interfaces used for metrics feature that are used by other modules in the library.

components.name: http-auth-spi
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - HTTP Auth SPI module contains the interfaces for authentication that are used by other modules in the library.

components.name: httpclient
components.description: Apache HttpComponents Client

components.name: bcutil-jdk18on
components.description: The Bouncy Castle Java APIs for ASN.1 extension and utility APIs used to support bcpkix and bctls. This jar contains APIs for Java 8 and later.

components.name: http-auth-aws
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - HTTP Auth AWS module contains interfaces and implementations for HTTP authentication specific to AWS.

components.name: eventstream
components.description: The AWS Event Stream decoder library.

components.name: aws-crt
components.description: Java bindings for the AWS SDK Common Runtime

components.name: aws-xml-protocol
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - module holds the classes for AWS Xml protocol

components.name: commons-codec
components.description: The Apache Commons Codec component contains encoders and decoders for various formats such as Base16, Base32, Base64, digest, and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

components.name: utils-lite
components.description: A package providing minimal external utils.

components.name: http-auth
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - HTTP Auth module contains interfaces and implementations for generic HTTP authentication

components.name: bcpg-jdk18on
components.description: The Bouncy Castle Java APIs for the OpenPGP Protocol. The APIs are designed primarily to be used in conjunction with the BC Java provider but may also be used with other providers providing cryptographic services.

components.name: kms
components.description: The AWS Java SDK for AWS KMS module holds the client classes that are used for communicating with AWS Key Management Service

components.name: identity-spi
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - Identity SPI module contains the Identity interfaces that are used by other modules in the library.

components.name: checksums
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - Checksums module contains checksums and related items that are used by other modules in the library.

components.name: reactive-streams
components.description: A Protocol for Asynchronous Non-Blocking Data Sequence

components.name: http-auth-aws-eventstream
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - HTTP Auth AWS Event Stream module contains interfaces and implementations for AWS specific authentication of event streams in HTTP services.

components.name: protocol-core
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - module holds the core protocol classes

components.name: netty-transport-native-unix-common
components.description: Static library which contains common unix utilities.

components.name: aws-json-protocol
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - module holds the classes for AWS Json protocol

components.name: profiles
components.description: Profile module allows loading information from AWS configuration and credentials files.

components.name: crt-core
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - AWS CRT Core holds common types that are built on the AWS Common Runtime

components.name: sdk-core
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - SDK Core runtime module holds the classes that are used by the individual service clients to interact with Amazon Web Services. Users need to depend on aws-java-sdk artifact for accessing individual client classes.

components.name: slf4j-api
components.description: The slf4j API

components.name: commons-io
components.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

components.name: arns
components.description: The AWS SDK for Java - Arns module holds the classes that are related to AWS ARN
